label: A Ghost of What We Were

strings.dragDrop: Give me something to remember you by
strings.idle: Staring at the door that never opens
strings.paused: Holding my breath so you won't leave
strings.loaded: I've found a piece of us

strings.repeatOne: Revisiting the exact moment it broke

strings.invalidLangFile: These words have no meaning anymore
strings.designedIn: Built in the wreckage of a broken heart
strings.seekLabel: Searching for where we went wrong
strings.rewindTitle: Undo the years (Shift+Click for 10s, Ctrl+Click for the first day)
strings.forwardTitle: Move toward the end (Shift+Click for 10s, Ctrl+Click for the final word)
strings.clearCacheTitle: THE END OF THE WORLD: If you purge this, the last evidence of our existence vanishes. To clear the cache is to burn the house we built together. Everything—the themes, the voices, the traces of 'us'—will be ashes. Are you ready for the absolute silence?
